---
title: "About"
---


## Profile
I specialise in business intelligence, enterprise reporting, and analytics delivery — with a focus on building trusted reporting environments, improving data quality, and translating stakeholder needs into scalable solutions. :contentReference[oaicite:2]{index=2}

## Strengths I bring to teams
- **Business translation:** requirements → metrics → dashboards
- **Operational reporting:** consistent KPI definitions, governance, audit readiness
- **Data integration:** ETL pipelines and reporting-ready datasets
- **Enablement:** training, documentation, and adoption support

## Experience snapshot
- Data & Reporting Specialist Manager — Centratama Group (2022–2024)  
- Data Engineer / Tableau Expert — BCI Central (2020–2022)  
- BI & Data Warehouse — Asahimas Flat Glass (2018–2020) :contentReference[oaicite:3]{index=3}

## Currently
Master of Business Analytics (Monash University), Australia Awards Scholar.
